[boletas_concierto (1).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26362771/boletas_concierto.1.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Boletas – Concierto de Música Sacra</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@600;700;900&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --gold:#C9A84C;
    --gold-light:#F0D080;
    --brown-dark:#1A0D00;
    --cream:#FDF5E6;
    --accent:#2D6A4F;
    --radius:8px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{font-family:'EB Garamond',serif;background:#1A0D00;color:var(--cream);}

  /* PANEL DE CONTROLES */
  .controls{
    max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;padding:2rem 1.5rem;
  }
  .controls h1{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;
    color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:.04em;
  }
  .controls p{font-size:14px;color:#b09070;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}

  .field-full{margin-bottom:12px;}
  .field-full label,.field label{display:block;font-size:12px;color:#b09070;margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}
  .field-full input,.field input{
    width:100%;padding:10px 12px;
    border:1px solid #5a3a1a;border-radius:6px;
    font-family:'EB Garamond',serif;font-size:15px;
    background:#2a1500;color:var(--cream);outline:none;
  }
  .field-full input:focus,.field input:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
  .row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}

  .btn-gen{
    width:100%;padding:13px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8B6914,var(--gold));
    color:#1A0D00;border:none;border-radius:6px;
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
    cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;letter-spacing:.05em;
  }
  .btn-gen:hover{opacity:.9;}
  .btn-print{
    width:100%;padding:13px;
    background:transparent;color:var(--gold);
    border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:6px;
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;
    cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;display:none;letter-spacing:.05em;
  }
  .btn-print:hover{background:#2a1500;}
  .hint{font-size:12px;color:#b09070;margin-top:8px;text-align:center;}

  /* HOJAS */
  #sheets{display:none;margin-top:2rem;}

  .sheet{
    width:210mm;
    min-height:297mm;
    margin:0 auto 20px;
    background:white;
    padding:6mm;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;
    gap:5mm;
    border:1px solid #555;
  }

  /* BOLETA WRAPPER (boleta + talón) */
  .boleta-wrap{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
  }

  /* BOLETA */
  .boleta{
    position:relative;
    border-radius:6px 6px 0 0;
    overflow:hidden;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    justify-content:space-between;
    min-height:110mm;
  }

  /* TALÓN DESPRENDIBLE */
  .talon{
    border:1px solid #bbb;
    border-top:2px dashed #888;
    border-radius:0 0 5px 5px;
    background:#fff;
    padding:5px 12px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:8px;
    min-height:18mm;
  }
  .talon-label{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7px;
    color:#555;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .talon-codigo{
    font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;
    color:#2D2D2D;letter-spacing:3px;border:1px solid #aaa;
    border-radius:4px;padding:3px 8px;background:#f5f5f5;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .talon-right{
    font-size:7px;color:#888;text-align:right;line-height:1.5;
    max-width:90px;
  }
  .talon-scissors{
    font-size:13px;color:#999;flex-shrink:0;
  }

  /* fondo = imagen del flyer */
  .boleta-bg{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center top;
    filter:brightness(0.38) saturate(1.2);
  }
  /* overlay dorado suave */
  .boleta-bg::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(90,30,0,0.55) 0%,rgba(10,5,0,0.72) 100%);
  }

  .boleta-content{
    position:relative;z-index:2;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    justify-content:space-between;
    height:100%;padding:14px 16px;
  }

  /* franja dorada superior */
  .b-stripe{
    position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:5px;z-index:3;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8B6914,var(--gold-light),#8B6914);
  }

  .b-top{margin-top:6px;}
  .b-parroquia{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;
    color:var(--gold-light);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;margin-bottom:3px;
  }
  .b-evento{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;
    color:white;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:2px;
  }
  .b-subtitulo{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;
    color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:2px;
  }
  .b-fecha{font-size:9px;color:#d4b896;font-style:italic;}

  .b-mid{text-align:center;padding:10px 0;}
  .b-codigo-label{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7px;
    color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:5px;
  }
  .b-codigo{
    font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;
    color:var(--gold-light);
    background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    border:1px solid var(--gold);
    border-radius:5px;padding:7px 12px;
    display:inline-block;letter-spacing:5px;
    text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(201,168,76,0.6);
  }

  .b-bienvenida{
    font-family:'EB Garamond',serif;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;
    color:#e8d5b0;margin-top:10px;line-height:1.45;
  }

  .b-bot{
    border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.35);
    padding-top:7px;
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;
  }
  .b-num{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;
    color:var(--gold);
  }
  .b-aviso{
    font-size:7px;color:#a08060;text-align:right;
    max-width:58%;line-height:1.45;
  }

  /* BOLETA WRAPPER */
  .boleta-wrap{
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  }

  /* TALÓN */
  .talon{
    border:1px solid #bbb;
    border-top:2px dashed #999;
    border-radius:0 0 5px 5px;
    background:#fafafa;
    padding:5px 10px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .talon-scissors{font-size:14px;color:#aaa;flex-shrink:0;}
  .talon-label{
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:6.5px;
    color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:3px;
  }
  .talon-codigo{
    font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
    color:#222;letter-spacing:3px;
    border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:4px;
    padding:2px 7px;background:#fff;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .talon-info{
    font-size:7px;color:#888;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;line-height:1.5;
  }

  /* IMPRESIÓN */
  @media print{
    @page{
      size:A4 portrait;
      margin:6mm;
    }
    body{background:white;}
    .controls{display:none!important;}
    #sheets{display:block!important;margin:0;}
    .sheet{
      margin:0;border:none;
      page-break-after:always;
      break-after:page;
      width:100%;
      height:calc(297mm - 12mm);
      padding:0;
      gap:4mm;
    }
    .sheet:last-child{page-break-after:avoid;break-after:avoid;}
    .boleta-wrap{
      break-inside:avoid;
    }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="controls">
  <h1>Generador de Boletas</h1>
  <p>Concierto de Música Sacra · 4 boletas por hoja</p>

  <div class="field-full">
    <label>Nombre de la parroquia</label>
    <input type="text" id="parroquia" value="Parroquia Nuestra Señora de la Reconciliación">
  </div>
  <div class="field-full">
    <label>Nombre del evento</label>
    <input type="text" id="evento" value="Concierto de Música Sacra">
  </div>
  <div class="field-full">
    <label>Subtítulo</label>
    <input type="text" id="subtitulo" value="Cuarteto de Cuerdas">
  </div>
  <div class="field-full">
    <label>Fecha y hora</label>
    <input type="text" id="fecha" value="Sábado 11 de abril · 7:30 PM">
  </div>
  <div class="field-full">
    <label>Mensaje de bienvenida</label>
    <input type="text" id="bienvenida" value="¡Bienvenido! Ven y sígueme… y Él será tu paz.">
  </div>
  <div class="row">
    <div class="field">
      <label>Código inicial</label>
      <input type="number" id="desde" value="1" min="1">
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Código final</label>
      <input type="number" id="hasta" value="20" min="1">
    </div>
  </div>

  <button class="btn-gen" onclick="generar()">✦ Generar boletas</button>
  <button class="btn-print" id="btn-print" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ Imprimir</button>
  <p class="hint" id="hint"></p>
</div>

<div id="sheets"></div>

<script>
const POSTER_B64 = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

function generar(){
  const parroquia = document.getElementById('parroquia').value || 'Parroquia';
  const evento    = document.getElementById('evento').value    || 'Evento';
  const subtitulo = document.getElementById('subtitulo').value || '';
  const fecha     = document.getElementById('fecha').value     || '';
  const bienvenida= document.getElementById('bienvenida').value|| '¡Bienvenidos!';
  const desde     = parseInt(document.getElementById('desde').value) || 1;
  const hasta     = parseInt(document.getElementById('hasta').value) || 20;

  if(hasta < desde){ alert('El código final debe ser mayor al inicial'); return; }
  if(hasta - desde > 599){ alert('Máximo 600 boletas a la vez'); return; }

  const total = hasta - desde + 1;
  const hojas = Math.ceil(total / 4);
  const container = document.getElementById('sheets');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  container.style.display = 'block';

  for(let h = 0; h < hojas; h++){
    const sheet = document.createElement('div');
    sheet.className = 'sheet';
    for(let b = 0; b < 4; b++){
      const num = desde + (h * 4) + b;
      if(num > hasta){
        sheet.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
        continue;
      }
      const codigo = 'EP-' + String(num).padStart(3,'0');
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'boleta-wrap';
      div.innerHTML = `
        <div class="boleta">
          <div class="boleta-bg" style="background-image:url('${POSTER_B64}')"></div>
          <div class="b-stripe"></div>
          <div class="boleta-content">
            <div class="b-top">
              <div class="b-parroquia">${parroquia}</div>
              <div class="b-evento">${evento}</div>
              <div class="b-subtitulo">${subtitulo}</div>
              <div class="b-fecha">${fecha}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="b-mid">
              <div class="b-codigo-label">Código de ingreso</div>
              <div class="b-codigo">${codigo}</div>
              <div class="b-bienvenida">${bienvenida}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="b-bot">
              <div class="b-num">Boleta N° ${num}</div>
              <div class="b-aviso">Válida para una sola persona. No se reemplaza si se pierde.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="talon">
          <span class="talon-scissors">✂</span>
          <div>
            <div class="talon-label">Control de ingreso</div>
            <div class="talon-codigo">${codigo}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="talon-info">${evento} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${fecha}</div>
        </div>`;
      sheet.appendChild(div);
    }
    container.appendChild(sheet);
  }

  const txt = hojas === 1 ? '1 hoja' : `${hojas} hojas`;
  document.getElementById('hint').textContent = `${total} boletas generadas · ${txt} para imprimir`;
  document.getElementById('btn-print').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('btn-print').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
